S.FORM: = Joko Widodo = Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 6 jiyax 21 ka Joko Widodo ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Indonesia ta sayang o kiya ka Joko Widodo, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 10 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟoko widodo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟoko widodo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan indonəsia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟoko widodo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Joko Widodo = Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 6 jiyax 21 ka Joko Widodo ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Indonesia ta sayang o kiya ka Joko Widodo, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 10 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = ɟoko widodo = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ɟoko widodo ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan indonəsia ta sajaŋ o kija ka ɟoko widodo, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
